info.name: RecipeVault API
info.description: Complete API collection for RecipeVault recipe management and parsing

request.description: Search for recipes with optional filtering and pagination
Retrieve a specific recipe by its resource ID
Create a new recipe with full details

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Chocolate Chip Cookies - Updated",
  "description": "Classic homemade chocolate chip cookies with extra cocoa",
  "yield": 24,
  "prepTimeMinutes": 20,
  "cookTimeMinutes": 12,
  "source": "https://example.com/recipes",
  "originalImageUrl": "https://example.com/images/cookies-updated.jpg",
  "ingredients": [],
  "instructions": []
}

request.description:
Parse a recipe from an image using AI (Gemini). Returns parsed recipe data with confidence score.

Expected Responses:
- 200 OK: Successfully parsed recipe
- 422 Unprocessable Entity: No recipe detected in image
- 503 Service Unavailable: Gemini API failure
Check application health status and dependencies
